Ou thelomen de hymas agnoein, adelphoi, peri tōn koimōmenōn, hina mē lypēsthe kathōs kai hoi loipoi hoi mē echontes elpida.
ei gar pisteuomen hoti Iēsous apethanen kai anestē, houtōs kai ho theos tous koimēthentas dia tou Iēsou axei syn autō.
Touto gar hymin legomen en logō kyriou, hoti hēmeis hoi zōntes hoi perileipomenoi eis tēn parousian tou kyriou ou mē phthasōmen tous koimēthentas;
hoti autos ho kyrios en keleusmati, en phōnē archangelou kai en salpingi theou, katabēsetai ap' ouranou, kai hoi nekroi en Christō anastēsontai prōton,
epeita hēmeis hoi zōntes hoi perileipomenoi hama syn autois harpagēsometha en nephelais eis apantēsin tou kyriou eis aera; kai houtōs pantote syn kyriō esometha.
Hōste parakaleite allēlous en tois logois toutois.
Peri de tōn chronōn kai tōn kairōn, adelphoi, ou chreian echete hymin graphesthai,
autoi gar akribōs oidate hoti hēmera Kyriou hōs kleptēs en nykti houtōs erchetai.
hotan legōsin Eirēnē kai asphaleia, tote aiphnidios autois epistatai olethros hōsper hē ōdin tē en gastri echousē, kai ou mē ekphygōsin.
hymeis de, adelphoi, ouk este en skotei, hina hē hēmera hymas hōs kleptas katalabē,
pantes gar hymeis huioi phōtos este kai huioi hēmeras. Ouk esmen nyktos oude skotous;
ara oun mē katheudōmen hōs hoi loipoi, alla grēgorōmen kai nēphōmen.
hoi gar katheudontes nyktos katheudousin, kai hoi methyskomenoi nyktos methyousin;
hēmeis de hēmeras ontes nēphōmen, endysamenoi thōraka pisteōs kai agapēs kai perikephalaian elpida sōtērias;
hoti ouk etheto hēmas ho theos eis orgēn alla eis peripoiēsin sōtērias dia tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
tou apothanontos peri hēmōn hina eite grēgorōmen eite katheudōmen hama syn autō zēsōmen.
Dio parakaleite allēlous kai oikodomeite heis ton hena, kathōs kai poieite.
Erōtōmen de hymas, adelphoi, eidenai tous kopiōntas en hymin kai proistamenous hymōn en kyriō kai nouthetountas hymas,
kai hēgeisthai autous hyperekperissou en agapē dia to ergon autōn. eirēneuete en heautois.
Parakaloumen de hymas, adelphoi, noutheteite tous ataktous, paramytheisthe tous oligopsychous, antechesthe tōn asthenōn, makrothymeite pros pantas.
horate mē tis kakon anti kakou tini apodō, alla pantote to agathon diōkete eis allēlous kai eis pantas.
en panti eucharisteite; touto gar thelēma theou en Christō Iēsou eis hymas.
panta de dokimazete, to kalon katechete,
Autos de ho theos tēs eirēnēs hagiasai hymas holoteleis, kai holoklēron hymōn to pneuma kai hē psychē kai to sōma amemptōs en tē parousia tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou tērētheiē.
pistos ho kalōn hymas, hos kai poiēsei.
Aspasasthe tous adelphous pantas en philēmati hagiō.

name: 2 Thessalonians
chapters: PAULOS KAI SILOUANOS KAI TIMOTHEOS tē ekklēsia Thessalonikeōn en theō patri hēmōn kai kyriō Iēsou Christō;
charis hymin kai eirēnē apo theou patros kai kyriou Iēsou Christou.
Eucharistein opheilomen tō theō pantote peri hymōn, adelphoi, kathōs axion estin, hoti hyperauxanei hē pistis hymōn kai pleonazei hē agapē henos hekastou pantōn hymōn eis allēlous,
hōste autous hēmas en hymin enkauchasthai en tais ekklēsiais tou theou hyper tēs hypomonēs hymōn kai pisteōs en pasin tois diōgmois hymōn kai tais thlipsesin hais anechesthe,
endeigma tēs dikaias kriseōs tou theou, eis to kataxiōthēnai hymas tēs basileias tou theou, hyper hēs kai paschete,
eiper dikaion para theō antapodounai tois thlibousin hymas thlipsin
kai hymin tois thlibomenois anesin meth' hēmōn en tē apokalypsei tou kyriou Iēsou ap' ouranou met' angelōn dynameōs autou
en pyri phlogos, didontos ekdikēsin tois mē eidosi theon kai tois mē hypakouousin tō euangeliō tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou,
hoitines dikēn tisousin olethron aiōnion apo prosōpou tou kyriou kai apo tēs doxēs tēs ischyos autou,
hotan elthē endoxasthēnai en tois hagiois autou kai thaumasthēnai en pasin tois pisteusasin, hoti episteuthē to martyrion hēmōn eph' hymas, en tē hēmera ekeinē.
Eis ho kai proseuchometha pantote peri hymōn, hina hymas axiōsē tēs klēseōs ho theos hēmōn kai plērōsē pasan eudokian agathōsynēs kai ergon pisteōs en dynamei,
hopōs endoxasthē to onoma tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou en hymin, kai hymeis en autō, kata tēn charin tou theou hēmōn kai kyriou Iēsou Christou.
Erōtōmen de hymas, adelphoi, hyper tēs parousias tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou kai hēmōn episynagōgēs ep' auton,
eis to mē tacheōs saleuthēnai hymas apo tou noos mēde throeisthai mēte dia pneumatos mēte dia logou mēte di' epistolēs hōs di' hēmōn, hōs hoti enestēken hē hēmera tou kyriou.
mē tis hymas exapatēsē kata mēdena tropon; hoti ean mē elthē hē apostasia prōton kai apokalyphthē ho anthrōpos tēs anomias, ho huios tēs apōleias,
ho antikeimenos kai hyperairomenos epi panta legomenon theon ē sebasma, hōste auton eis ton naon tou theou kathisai, apodeiknynta heauton hoti estin theos .
Ou mnēmoneuete hoti eti ōn pros hymas tauta elegon hymin?
kai nyn to katechon oidate, eis to apokalyphthēnai auton en tō autou kairō;
to gar mystērion ēdē energeitai tēs anomias; monon ho katechōn arti heōs ek mesou genētai.
kai tote apokalyphthēsetai ho anomos, hon ho kyrios Iēsous anelei tō pneumati tou stomatos autou kai katargēsei tē epiphaneia tēs parousias autou,
hou estin hē parousia kat' energeian tou Satana en pasē dynamei kai sēmeiois kai terasin pseudous
kai en pasē apatē adikias tois apollymenois, anth' hōn tēn agapēn tēs alētheias ouk edexanto eis to sōthēnai autous;
kai dia touto pempei autois ho theos energeian planēs eis to pisteusai autous tō pseudei,
hina krithōsin pantes hoi mē pisteusantes tē alētheia alla eudokēsantes tē adikia.
Hēmeis de opheilomen eucharistein tō theō pantote peri hymōn, adelphoi ēgapēmenoi hypo Kyriou, hoti heilato hymas ho theos ap' archēs eis sōtērian en hagiasmō pneumatos kai pistei alētheias,
eis ho ekalesen hymas dia tou euangeliou hēmōn, eis peripoiēsin doxēs tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou.
Ara oun, adelphoi, stēkete, kai krateite tas paradoseis has edidachthēte eite dia logou eite di' epistolēs hēmōn.
Autos de ho kyrios hēmōn Iēsous Christos kai ho theos ho patēr hēmōn, ho agapēsas hēmas kai dous paraklēsin aiōnian kai elpida agathēn en chariti,
parakalesai hymōn tas kardias kai stērixai en panti ergō kai logō agathō.
To loipon proseuchesthe, adelphoi, peri hēmōn, hina ho logos tou kyriou trechē kai doxazētai kathōs kai pros hymas,
kai hina rhysthōmen apo tōn atopōn kai ponērōn anthrōpōn, ou gar pantōn hē pistis.
Pistos de estin ho kyrios, hos stērixei hymas kai phylaxei apo tou ponērou.
pepoithamen de en kyriō eph' hymas, hoti ha parangellomen kai poieite kai poiēsete.
HO de kyrios kateuthynai hymōn tas kardias eis tēn agapēn tou theou kai eis tēn hypomonēn tou christou.
Parangellomen de hymin, adelphoi, en onomati tou kyriou Iēsou Christou stellesthai hymas apo pantos adelphou ataktōs peripatountos kai mē kata tēn paradosin hēn parelabete par' hēmōn.
autoi gar oidate pōs dei mimeisthai hēmas, hoti ouk ētaktēsamen en hymin
oude dōrean arton ephagomen para tinos, all' en kopō kai mochthō nyktos kai hēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina hymōn;
ouch hoti ouk echomen exousian, all' hina heautous typon dōmen hymin eis to mimeisthai hēmas.
kai gar hote ēmen pros hymas, touto parēngellomen hymin, hoti ei tis ou thelei ergazesthai mēde esthietō.
akouomen gar tinas peripatountas en hymin ataktōs, mēden ergazomenous alla periergazomenous;
tois de toioutois parangellomen kai parakaloumen en kyriō Iēsou Christō hina meta hēsychias ergazomenoi ton heautōn arton esthiōsin.
Hymeis de, adelphoi, mē enkakēsēte kalopoiountes.
ei de tis ouch hypakouei tō logō hēmōn dia tēs epistolēs, touton sēmeiousthe, mē synanamignysthai autō, hina entrapē;
kai mē hōs echthron hēgeisthe, alla noutheteite hōs adelphon.
Autos de ho kyrios tēs eirēnēs dōē hymin tēn eirēnēn dia pantos en panti tropō. ho kyrios meta pantōn hymōn.
HO aspasmos tē emē cheiri Paulou, ho estin sēmeion en pasē epistolē; houtōs graphō.

name: 1 Timothy
chapters: PAULOS apostolos Christou Iēsou kat' epitagēn theou sōtēros hēmōn kai Christou Iēsou tēs elpidos hēmōn
Timotheō gnēsiō teknō en pistei; charis, eleos, eirēnē apo theou patros kai Christou Iēsou tou kyriou hēmōn.
Kathōs parekalesa se prosmeinai en Ephesō, poreuomenos eis Makedonian, hina parangeilēs tisin mē heterodidaskalein
mēde prosechein mythois kai genealogiais aperantois, haitines ekzētēseis parechousi mallon ē oikonomian theou tēn en pistei,
to de telos tēs parangelias estin agapē ek katharas kardias kai syneidēseōs agathēs kai pisteōs anypokritou,
hōn tines astochēsantes exetrapēsan eis mataiologian,
thelontes einai nomodidaskaloi, mē noountes mēte ha legousin mēte peri tinōn diabebaiountai.
Oidamen de hoti kalos ho nomos ean tis autō nomimōs chrētai,
eidōs touto hoti dikaiō nomos ou keitai, anomois de kai anypotaktois, asebesi kai hamartōlois, anosiois kai bebēlois, patrolōais kai mētrolōais, androphonois,
pornois, arsenokoitais, andrapodistais, pseustais, epiorkois, kai ei ti heteron tē hygiainousē didaskalia antikeitai,
kata to euangelion tēs doxēs tou makariou theou, ho episteuthēn egō.
Parakalō oun prōton pantōn poieisthai deēseis, proseuchas, enteuxeis, eucharistias, hyper pantōn anthrōpōn,
hyper basileōn kai pantōn tōn en hyperochē ontōn, hina ēremon kai hēsychion bion diagōmen en pasē eusebeia kai semnotēti.
touto kalon kai apodekton enōpion tou sōtēros hēmōn theou
hos pantas anthrōpous thelei sōthēnai kai eis epignōsin alētheias elthein.
Heis gar theos, heis kai mesitēs theou kai anthrōpōn anthrōpos Christos Iēsous,
ho dous heauton antilytron hyper pantōn, to martyrion kairois idiois;
eis ho etethēn egō kēryx kai apostolos, alētheian legō, ou pseudomai, didaskalos ethnōn en pistei kai alētheia.
Boulomai oun proseuchesthai tous andras en panti topō, epairontas hosious cheiras chōris orgēs kai dialogismōn.
Hōsautōs gynaikas en katastolē kosmiō meta aidous kai sōphrosynēs kosmein heautas, mē en plegmasin kai chrysiō ē margaritais ē himatismō polytelei,
all' ho prepei gynaixin epangellomenais theosebeian, di' ergōn agathōn.
Gynē en hēsychia manthanetō en pasē hypotagē;
didaskein de gynaiki ouk epitrepō, oude authentein andros, all' einai en hēsychia.
Adam gar prōtos eplasthē, eita Heua;
kai Adam ouk ēpatēthē, hē de gynē exapatētheisa en parabasei gegonen.
sōthēsetai de dia tēs teknogonias, ean meinōsin en pistei kai agapē kai hagiasmō meta sōphrosynēs.
pistos ho logos. Ei tis episkopēs oregetai, kalou ergou epithymei.
dei oun ton episkopon anepilēmpton einai, mias gynaikos andra, nēphalion, sōphrona, kosmion, philoxenon, didaktikon,
mē paroinon, mē plēktēn, alla epieikē, amachon, aphilargyron,
tou idiou oikou kalōs proistamenon, tekna echonta en hypotagē meta pasēs semnotētos;
ei de tis tou idiou oikou prostēnai ouk oiden, pōs ekklēsias theou epimelēsetai?
mē neophyton, hina mē typhōtheis eis krima empesē tou diabolou.
dei de kai martyrian kalēn echein apo tōn exōthen, hina mē eis oneidismon empesē kai pagida tou diabolou.
Diakonous hōsautōs semnous, mē dilogous, mē oinō pollō prosechontas, mē aischrokerdeis,
echontas to mystērion tēs pisteōs en kathara syneidēsei.
kai houtoi de dokimazesthōsan prōton, eita diakoneitōsan anenklētoi ontes.
gynaikas hōsautōs semnas, mē diabolous, nēphalious, pistas en pasin.
diakonoi estōsan mias gynaikos andres, teknōn kalōs proistamenoi kai tōn idiōn oikōn;
hoi gar kalōs diakonēsantes bathmon heautois kalon peripoiountai kai pollēn parrēsian en pistei tē en Christō Iēsou.
To de pneuma rhētōs legei hoti en hysterois kairois apostēsontai tines tēs pisteōs, prosechontes pneumasi planois kai didaskaliais daimoniōn
en hypokrisei pseudologōn, kekaustēriasmenōn tēn idian syneidēsin,
kōlyontōn gamein, apechesthai brōmatōn ha ho theos ektisen eis metalēmpsin meta eucharistias tois pistois kai epegnōkosi tēn alētheian.
hoti pan ktisma theou kalon, kai ouden apoblēton meta eucharistias lambanomenon,
hagiazetai gar dia logou theou kai enteuxeōs.
Tauta hypotithemenos tois adelphois kalos esē diakonos Christou Iēsou, entrephomenos tois logois tēs pisteōs kai tēs kalēs didaskalias hē parēkolouthēkas,
tous de bebēlous kai graōdeis mythous paraitou. gymnaze de seauton pros eusebeian;
hē gar sōmatikē gymnasia pros oligon estin ōphelimos, hē de eusebeia pros panta ōphelimos estin, epangelian echousa zōēs tēs nyn kai tēs mellousēs.
pistos ho logos kai pasēs apodochēs axios,
eis touto gar kopiōmen kai agōnizometha, hoti ēlpikamen epi theō zōnti, hos estin sōtēr pantōn anthrōpōn, malista pistōn.
mēdeis sou tēs neotētos kataphroneitō, alla typos ginou tōn pistōn en logō, en anastrophē, en agapē, en pistei, en hagnia.
heōs erchomai proseche tē anagnōsei, tē paraklēsei, tē didaskalia.
mē amelei tou en soi charismatos, ho edothē soi dia prophēteias meta epitheseōs tōn cheirōn tou presbyteriou.
tauta meleta, en toutois isthi, hina sou hē prokopē phanera ē pasin;
epeche seautō kai tē didaskalia; epimene autois; touto gar poiōn kai seauton sōseis kai tous akouontas sou.
Presbyterō mē epiplēxēs, alla parakalei hōs patera, neōterous hōs adelphous,
presbyteras hōs mēteras, neōteras hōs adelphas en pasē hagnia.
ei de tis chēra tekna ē ekgona echei, manthanetōsan prōton ton idion oikon eusebein kai amoibas apodidonai tois progonois, touto gar estin apodekton enōpion tou theou.
hē de ontōs chēra kai memonōmenē ēlpiken epi ton theon kai prosmenei tais deēsesin kai tais proseuchais nyktos kai hēmeras;
kai tauta parangelle, hina anepilēmptoi ōsin;
ei de tis tōn idiōn kai malista oikeiōn ou pronoei, tēn pistin ērnētai kai estin apistou cheirōn.
Chēra katalegesthō mē elatton etōn hexēkonta gegonuia, henos andros gynē,
en ergois kalois martyroumenē, ei eteknotrophēsen, ei exenodochēsen, ei hagiōn podas enipsen, ei thlibomenois epērkesen, ei panti ergō agathō epēkolouthēsen.
neōteras de chēras paraitou; hotan gar katastrēniasōsin tou christou, gamein thelousin,
echousai krima hoti tēn prōtēn pistin ēthetēsan;
hama de kai argai manthanousin, perierchomenai tas oikias, ou monon de argai alla kai phlyaroi kai periergoi, lalousai ta mē deonta.
boulomai oun neōteras gamein, teknogonein, oikodespotein, mēdemian aphormēn didonai tō antikeimenō loidorias charin;
ēdē gar tines exetrapēsan opisō tou Satana.
ei tis pistē echei chēras, eparkeitō autais, kai mē bareisthō hē ekklēsia, hina tais ontōs chērais eparkesē.
Hoi kalōs proestōtes presbyteroi diplēs timēs axiousthōsan, malista hoi kopiōntes en logō kai didaskalia;
Hosoi eisin hypo zygon douloi, tous idious despotas pasēs timēs axious hēgeisthōsan, hina mē to onoma tou theou kai hē didaskalia blasphēmētai.
hoi de pistous echontes despotas mē kataphroneitōsan, hoti adelphoi eisin; alla mallon douleuetōsan, hoti pistoi eisin kai agapētoi hoi tēs euergesias antilambanomenoi. Tauta didaske kai parakalei.
ei tis heterodidaskalei kai mē proserchetai hygiainousi logois, tois tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, kai tē kat' eusebeian didaskalia,
tetyphōtai, mēden epistamenos, alla nosōn peri zētēseis kai logomachias, ex hōn ginetai phthonos, eris, blasphēmiai, hyponoiai ponērai,
diaparatribai diephtharmenōn anthrōpōn ton noun kai apesterēmenōn tēs alētheias, nomizontōn porismon einai tēn eusebeian.
estin de porismos megas hē eusebeia meta autarkeias;
ouden gar eisēnenkamen eis ton kosmon, hoti oude exenenkein ti dynametha;
echontes de diatrophas kai skepasmata, toutois arkesthēsometha.
hoi de boulomenoi ploutein empiptousin eis peirasmon kai pagida kai epithymias pollas anoētous kai blaberas, haitines bythizousi tous anthrōpous eis olethron kai apōleian;
rhiza gar pantōn tōn kakōn estin hē philargyria, hēs tines oregomenoi apeplanēthēsan apo tēs pisteōs kai heautous periepeiran odynais pollais.
Sy de, ō anthrōpe theou, tauta pheuge; diōke de dikaiosynēn, eusebeian, pistin, agapēn, hypomonēn, praupathian.
agōnizou ton kalon agōna tēs pisteōs, epilabou tēs aiōniou zōēs, eis hēn eklēthēs kai hōmologēsas tēn kalēn homologian enōpion pollōn martyrōn.
parangellō soi enōpion tou theou tou zōogonountos ta panta kai Christou Iēsou tou martyrēsantos epi Pontiou Peilatou tēn kalēn homologian,
tērēsai se tēn entolēn aspilon anepilēmpton mechri tēs epiphaneias tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou,
hēn kairois idiois deixei ho makarios kai monos dynastēs, ho basileus tōn basileuontōn kai kyrios tōn kyrieuontōn,
ho monos echōn athanasian, phōs oikōn aprositon, hon eiden oudeis anthrōpōn oude idein dynatai; hō timē kai kratos aiōnion; amēn.
Tois plousiois en tō nyn aiōni parangelle mē hypsēlophronein mēde ēlpikenai epi ploutou adēlotēti, all' epi theō tō parechonti hēmin panta plousiōs eis apolausin,
agathoergein, ploutein en ergois kalois, eumetadotous einai, koinōnikous,
apothēsaurizontas heautois themelion kalon eis to mellon, hina epilabōntai tēs ontōs zōēs.
Ō Timothee, tēn parathēkēn phylaxon, ektrepomenos tas bebēlous kenophōnias kai antitheseis tēs pseudōnymou gnōseōs,
hēn tines epangellomenoi peri tēn pistin ēstochēsan. HĒ charis meth' hymōn.

name: 2 Timothy
chapters: PAULOS apostolos Christou Iēsou dia thelēmatos theou kat' epangelian zōēs tēs en Christō Iēsou
Timotheō agapētō teknō; charis, eleos, eirēnē apo theou patros kai Christou Iēsou tou kyriou hēmōn.
Charin echō tō theō, hō latreuō apo progonōn en kathara syneidēsei, hōs adialeipton echō tēn peri sou mneian en tais deēsesin mou, nyktos kai hēmeras
epipothōn se idein, memnēmenos sou tōn dakryōn, hina charas plērōthō
hypomnēsin labōn tēs en soi anypokritou pisteōs, hētis enōkēsen prōton en tē mammē sou Lōidi kai tē mētri sou Eunikē, pepeismai de hoti kai en soi.
di' hēn aitian anamimnēskō se anazōpyrein to charisma tou theou, ho estin en soi dia tēs epitheseōs tōn cheirōn mou;
ou gar edōken hēmin ho theos pneuma deilias, alla dynameōs kai agapēs kai sōphronismou.
mē oun epaischynthēs to martyrion tou kyriou hēmōn mēde eme ton desmion autou, alla synkakopathēson tō euangeliō kata dynamin theou,
tou sōsantos hēmas kai kalesantos klēsei hagia, ou kata ta erga hēmōn alla kata idian prothesin kai charin, tēn dotheisan hēmin en Christō Iēsou pro chronōn aiōniōn,
phanerōtheisan de nyn dia tēs epiphaneias tou sōtēros hēmōn Christou Iēsou, katargēsantos men ton thanaton phōtisantos de zōēn kai aphtharsian dia tou euangeliou,
eis ho etethēn egō kēryx kai apostolos kai didaskalos.
Sy oun, teknon mou, endynamou en tē chariti tē en Christō Iēsou,
kai ha ēkousas par' emou dia pollōn martyrōn, tauta parathou pistois anthrōpois, hoitines hikanoi esontai kai heterous didaxai.
synkakopathēson hōs kalos stratiōtēs Christou Iēsou.
oudeis strateuomenos empleketai tais tou biou pragmatiais, hina tō stratologēsanti aresē;
ean de kai athlē tis, ou stephanoutai ean mē nomimōs athlēsē;
ton kopiōnta geōrgon dei prōton tōn karpōn metalambanein.
noei ho legō; dōsei gar soi ho kyrios synesin en pasin.
mnēmoneue Iēsoun Christon egēgermenon ek nekrōn, ek spermatos Daueid, kata to euangelion mou;
en hō kakopathō mechri desmōn hōs kakourgos. alla ho logos tou theou ou dedetai;
dia touto panta hypomenō dia tous eklektous, hina kai autoi sōtērias tychōsin tēs en Christō Iēsou meta doxēs aiōniou.
pistos ho logos; ei gar synapethanomen, kai synzēsomen;
ei hypomenomen, kai synbasileusomen; ei arnēsometha, kakeinos arnēsetai hēmas;
ei apistoumen, ekeinos pistos menei, arnēsasthai gar heauton ou dynatai.
Tauta hypomimnēske, diamartyromenos enōpion tou theou, mē logomachein, ep' ouden chrēsimon, epi katastrophē tōn akouontōn.
spoudason seauton dokimon parastēsai tō theō, ergatēn anepaischynton, orthotomounta ton logon tēs alētheias.
tas de bebēlous kenophōnias periistaso; epi pleion gar prokopsousin asebeias,
kai ho logos autōn hōs gangraina nomēn hexei; hōn estin Hymenaios kai Philētos,
hoitines peri tēn alētheian ēstochēsan, legontes anastasin ēdē gegonenai, kai anatrepousin tēn tinōn pistin.
ho mentoi stereos themelios tou theou hestēken, echōn tēn sphragida tautēn Egnō Kyrios tous ontas autou, kai Apostētō apo adikias pas ho onomazōn to onoma Kyriou.
en megalē de oikia ouk estin monon skeuē chrysa kai argyra alla kai xylina kai ostrakina, kai ha men eis timēn ha de eis atimian;
Touto de ginōske hoti en eschatais hēmerais enstēsontai kairoi chalepoi;
esontai gar hoi anthrōpoi philautoi, philargyroi, alazones, hyperēphanoi, blasphēmoi, goneusin apeitheis, acharistoi, anosioi,
astorgoi, aspondoi, diaboloi, akrateis, anēmeroi, aphilagathoi,
prodotai, propeteis, tetyphōmenoi, philēdonoi mallon ē philotheoi,
echontes morphōsin eusebeias tēn de dynamin autēs ērnēmenoi; kai toutous apotrepou.
ek toutōn gar eisin hoi endynontes eis tas oikias kai aichmalōtizontes gynaikaria sesōreumena hamartiais, agomena epithymiais poikilais,
pantote manthanonta kai mēdepote eis epignōsin alētheias elthein dynamena.
hon tropon de Iannēs kai Iambrēs antestēsan Mōusei, houtōs kai houtoi anthistantai tē alētheia, anthrōpoi katephtharmenoi ton noun, adokimoi peri tēn pistin.
all' ou prokopsousin epi pleion, hē gar anoia autōn ekdēlos estai pasin, hōs kai hē ekeinōn egeneto.
Sy de parēkolouthēsas mou tē didaskalia, tē agōgē, tē prothesei, tē pistei, tē makrothymia, tē agapē, tē hypomonē,
tois diōgmois, tois pathēmasin, hoia moi egeneto en Antiocheia, en Ikoniō, en Lystrois, hoious diōgmous hypēnenka; kai ek pantōn me erysato ho kyrios.
kai pantes de hoi thelontes zēn eusebōs en Christō Iēsou diōchthēsontai;
ponēroi de anthrōpoi kai goētes prokopsousin epi to cheiron, planōntes kai planōmenoi.
sy de mene en hois emathes kai epistōthēs, eidōs para tinōn emathes,
kai hoti apo brephous hiera grammata oidas, ta dynamena se sophisai eis sōtērian dia pisteōs tēs en Christō Iēsou;
pasa graphē theopneustos kai ōphelimos pros didaskalian, pros elegmon, pros epanorthōsin, pros paideian tēn en dikaiosynē,
hina artios ē ho tou theou anthrōpos, pros pan ergon agathon exērtismenos.
Diamartyromai enōpion tou theou kai Christou Iēsou, tou mellontos krinein zōntas kai nekrous, kai tēn epiphaneian autou kai tēn basileian autou;
kēryxon ton logon, epistēthi eukairōs akairōs, elenxon, epitimēson, parakaleson, en pasē makrothymia kai didachē.
estai gar kairos hote tēs hygiainousēs didaskalias ouk anexontai, alla kata tas idias epithymias heautois episōreusousin didaskalous knēthomenoi tēn akoēn,
kai apo men tēs alētheias tēn akoēn apostrepsousin, epi de tous mythous ektrapēsontai.
sy de nēphe en pasin, kakopathēson, ergon poiēson euangelistou, tēn diakonian sou plērophorēson.
Egō gar ēdē spendomai, kai ho kairos tēs analyseōs mou ephestēken.
ton kalon agōna ēgōnismai, ton dromon teteleka, tēn pistin tetērēka;
loipon apokeitai moi ho tēs dikaiosynēs stephanos, hon apodōsei moi ho kyrios en ekeinē tē hēmera, ho dikaios kritēs, ou monon de emoi alla kai pasin tois ēgapēkosi tēn epiphaneian autou.
Dēmas gar me enkateleipen agapēsas ton nyn aiōna, kai eporeuthē eis Thessalonikēn, Krēskēs eis Galatian, Titos eis Dalmatian;
Loukas estin monos met' emou. Markon analabōn age meta seautou, estin gar moi euchrēstos eis diakonian,
ton phelonēn, hon apeleipon en Trōadi para Karpō, erchomenos phere, kai ta biblia, malista tas membranas.
Alexandros ho chalkeus polla moi kaka enedeixato; apodōsei autō ho kyrios kata ta erga autou;
hon kai sy phylassou, lian gar antestē tois hēmeterois logois.
En tē prōtē mou apologia oudeis moi paregeneto, alla pantes me enkateleipon; mē autois logistheiē;
ho de kyrios moi parestē kai enedynamōsen me, hina di' emou to kērygma plērophorēthē kai akousōsin panta ta ethnē, kai erysthēn ek stomatos leontos.
rhysetai me ho kyrios apo pantos ergou ponērou kai sōsei eis tēn basileian autou tēn epouranion; hō hē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn, amēn.
Aspasai Priskan kai Akylan kai ton Onēsiphorou oikon.
Erastos emeinen en Korinthō, Trophimon de apeleipon en Milētō asthenounta.
Spoudason pro cheimōnos elthein. Aspazetai se Euboulos kai Poudēs kai Linos kai Klaudia kai hoi adelphoi pantes.
HO kyrios meta tou pneumatos sou. hē charis meth' hymōn.

name: Titus
chapters: PAULOS doulos theou, apostolos de Iēsou Christou kata pistin eklektōn theou kai epignōsin alētheias tēs kat' eusebeian
ep' elpidi zōēs aiōniou, hēn epēngeilato ho apseudēs theos pro chronōn aiōniōn
ephanerōsen de kairois idiois, ton logon autou en kērygmati ho episteuthēn egō kat' epitagēn tou sōtēros hēmōn theou,
Titō gnēsiō teknō kata koinēn pistin; charis kai eirēnē apo theou patros kai Christou Iēsou tou sōtēros hēmōn.
Toutou charin apeleipon se en Krētē hina ta leiponta epidiorthōsē, kai katastēsēs kata polin presbyterous, hōs egō soi dietaxamēn,
ei tis estin anenklētos, mias gynaikos anēr, tekna echōn pista, mē en katēgoria asōtias ē anypotakta.
dei gar ton episkopon anenklēton einai hōs theou oikonomon, mē authadē, mē orgilon, mē paroinon, mē plēktēn, mē aischrokerdē,
alla philoxenon, philagathon, sōphrona, dikaion, hosion, enkratē,
antechomenon tou kata tēn didachēn pistou logou, hina dynatos ē kai parakalein en tē didaskalia tē hygiainousē kai tous antilegontas elenchein.
Eisin gar polloi anypotaktoi, mataiologoi kai phrenapatai, malista hoi ek tēs peritomēs,
hous dei epistomizein, hoitines holous oikous anatrepousin didaskontes ha mē dei aischrou kerdous charin.
eipen tis ex autōn, idios autōn prophētēs, Krētes aei pseustai, kaka thēria, gasteres argai;
hē martyria hautē estin alēthēs. di' hēn aitian elenche autous apotomōs, hina hygiainōsin en tē pistei,
mē prosechontes Ioudaikois mythois kai entolais anthrōpōn apostrephomenōn tēn alētheian.
panta kathara tois katharois; tois de memiammenois kai apistois ouden katharon, alla memiantai autōn kai ho nous kai hē syneidēsis.
theon homologousin eidenai, tois de ergois arnountai, bdelyktoi ontes kai apeitheis kai pros pan ergon agathon adokimoi.
Sy de lalei ha prepei tē hygiainousē didaskalia.
Presbytas nēphalious einai, semnous, sōphronas, hygiainontas tē pistei, tē agapē, tē hypomonē.
presbytidas hōsautōs en katastēmati hieroprepeis, mē diabolous mēde oinō pollō dedoulōmenas, kalodidaskalous,
hina sōphronizōsi tas neas philandrous einai, philoteknous,
sōphronas, hagnas, oikourgous, agathas, hypotassomenas tois idiois andrasin, hina mē ho logos tou theou blasphēmētai.
peri panta seauton parechomenos typon kalōn ergōn, en tē didaskalia aphthorian, semnotēta,
logon hygiē akatagnōston, hina ho ex enantias entrapē mēden echōn legein peri hēmōn phaulon.
doulous idiois despotais hypotassesthai en pasin, euarestous einai, mē antilegontas,
mē nosphizomenous, alla pasan pistin endeiknymenous agathēn, hina tēn didaskalian tēn tou sōtēros hēmōn theou kosmōsin en pasin.
Epephanē gar hē charis tou theou sōtērios pasin anthrōpois
paideuousa hēmas, hina arnēsamenoi tēn asebeian kai tas kosmikas epithymias sōphronōs kai dikaiōs kai eusebōs zēsōmen en tō nyn aiōni,
prosdechomenoi tēn makarian elpida kai epiphaneian tēs doxēs tou megalou theou kai sōtēros hēmōn Christou Iēsou,
hos edōken heauton hyper hēmōn hina lytrōsētai hēmas apo pasēs anomias kai katharisē heautō laon periousion, zēlōtēn kalōn ergōn.
Tauta lalei kai parakalei kai elenche meta pasēs epitagēs; mēdeis sou periphroneitō.
Hypomimnēske autous archais exousiais hypotassesthai peitharchein, pros pan ergon agathon hetoimous einai,
mēdena blasphēmein, amachous einai, epieikeis, pasan endeiknymenous prautēta pros pantas anthrōpous.
Ēmen gar pote kai hēmeis anoētoi, apeitheis, planōmenoi, douleuontes epithymiais kai hēdonais poikilais, en kakia kai phthonō diagontes, stygētoi, misountes allēlous.
hote de hē chrēstotēs kai hē philanthrōpia epephanē tou sōtēros hēmōn theou,
ouk ex ergōn tōn en dikaiosynē ha epoiēsamen hēmeis alla kata to autou eleos esōsen hēmas dia loutrou palingenesias kai anakainōseōs pneumatos hagiou,
hou execheen eph' hēmas plousiōs dia Iēsou Christou tou sōtēros hēmōn,
hina dikaiōthentes tē ekeinou chariti klēronomoi genēthōmen kat' elpida zōēs aiōniou.
Pistos ho logos, kai peri toutōn boulomai se diabebaiousthai, hina phrontizōsin kalōn ergōn proistasthai hoi pepisteukotes theō. Tauta estin kala kai ōphelima tois anthrōpois;
mōras de zētēseis kai genealogias kai erin kai machas nomikas periistaso, eisin gar anōpheleis kai mataioi.
hairetikon anthrōpon meta mian kai deuteran nouthesian paraitou,
eidōs hoti exestraptai ho toioutos kai hamartanei, ōn autokatakritos.
Hotan pempsō Arteman pros se ē Tychikon, spoudason elthein pros me eis Nikopolin, ekei gar kekrika paracheimasai.
Zēnan ton nomikon kai Apollōn spoudaiōs propempson, hina mēden autois leipē.
Manthanetōsan de kai hoi hēmeteroi kalōn ergōn proistasthai eis tas anankaias chreias, hina mē ōsin akarpoi.
Aspazontai se hoi met' emou pantes. Aspasai tous philountas hēmas en pistei. HĒ charis meta pantōn hymōn.

name: Philemon
chapters: PAULOS desmios Christou Iēsou kai Timotheos ho adelphos Philēmoni tō agapētō kai synergō hēmōn
kai Apphia tē adelphē kai Archippō tō synstratiōtē hēmōn kai tē kat' oikon sou ekklēsia;
charis hymin kai eirēnē apo theou patros hēmōn kai kyriou Iēsou Christou.
Eucharistō tō theō mou pantote mneian sou poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou,
akouōn sou tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin hēn echeis eis ton kyrion Iēsoun kai eis pantas tous hagious,
hopōs hē koinōnia tēs pisteōs sou energēs genētai en epignōsei pantos agathou tou en hēmin eis Christon;
charan gar pollēn eschon kai paraklēsin epi tē agapē sou, hoti ta splanchna tōn hagiōn anapepautai dia sou, adelphe.
Dio, pollēn en Christō parrēsian echōn epitassein soi to anēkon,
dia tēn agapēn mallon parakalō, toioutos ōn hōs Paulos presbytēs nyni de kai desmios Christou Iēsou,
parakalō se peri tou emou teknou, hon egennēsa en tois desmois Onēsimon,
ton pote soi achrēston nyni de soi kai emoi euchrēston,
hon anepempsa soi auton, tout' estin ta ema splanchna;
hon egō eboulomēn pros emauton katechein, hina hyper sou moi diakonē en tois desmois tou euangeliou,
chōris de tēs sēs gnōmēs ouden ēthelēsa poiēsai, hina mē hōs kata anankēn to agathon sou ē alla kata hekousion.
tacha gar dia touto echōristhē pros hōran hina aiōnion auton apechēs,
ouketi hōs doulon alla hyper doulon, adelphon agapēton, malista emoi, posō de mallon soi kai en sarki kai en kyriō.
ei oun me echeis koinōnon, proslabou auton hōs eme.
ei de ti ēdikēsen se ē opheilei, touto emoi elloga;
egō Paulos egrapsa tē emē cheiri, egō apotisō; hina mē legō soi hoti kai seauton moi prosopheileis.
nai, adelphe, egō sou onaimēn en kyriō; anapauson mou ta splanchna en Christō.
Pepoithōs tē hypakoē sou egrapsa soi, eidōs hoti kai hyper ha legō poiēseis.
hama de kai hetoimaze moi xenian, elpizō gar hoti dia tōn proseuchōn hymōn charisthēsomai hymin.

name: Hebrews
chapters: POLYMERŌS KAI POLYTROPŌS palai ho theos lalēsas tois patrasin en tois prophētais
ep' eschatou tōn hēmerōn toutōn elalēsen hēmin en huiō, hon ethēken klēronomon pantōn, di' hou kai epoiēsen tous aiōnas;

hos ōn apaugasma tēs doxēs kai charaktēr tēs hypostaseōs autou, pherōn te ta panta tō rhēmati tēs dynameōs autou, katharismon tōn hamartiōn poiēsamenos ekathisen en dexia tēs megalōsynēs en hypsēlois,
tosoutō kreittōn genomenos tōn angelōn hosō diaphorōteron par' autous keklēronomēken onoma.
Tini gar eipen pote tōn angelōn Huios mou ei sy, egō sēmeron gegennēka se, kai palin Egō esomai autō eis patera, kai autos estai moi eis huion?
hotan de palin eisagagē ton prōtotokon eis tēn oikoumenēn, legei Kai proskynēsatōsan autō pantes angeloi theou.
Dia touto dei perissoterōs prosechein hēmas tois akoustheisin, mē pote pararyōmen.
ei gar ho di' angelōn lalētheis logos egeneto bebaios, kai pasa parabasis kai parakoē elaben endikon misthapodosian,
pōs hēmeis ekpheuxometha tēlikautēs amelēsantes sōtērias, hētis, archēn labousa laleisthai dia tou kyriou, hypo tōn akousantōn eis hēmas ebebaiōthē,
synepimartyrountos tou theou sēmeiois te kai terasin kai poikilais dynamesin kai pneumatos hagiou merismois kata tēn autou thelēsin?
Ou gar angelois hypetaxen tēn oikoumenēn tēn mellousan, peri hēs laloumen;
diemartyrato de pou tis legōn Ti estin anthrōpos hoti mimnēskē autou, ē huios anthrōpou hoti episkeptē auton?
ēlattōsas auton brachy ti par' angelous, doxē kai timē estephanōsas auton, kai katestēsas auton epi ta erga tōn cheirōn sou,
panta hypetaxas hypokatō tōn podōn autou; en tō gar hypotaxai autō ta panta ouden aphēken autō anypotakton. nyn de oupō horōmen autō ta panta hypotetagmena;
ton de brachy ti par' angelous ēlattōmenon blepomen Iēsoun dia to pathēma tou thanatou doxē kai timē estephanōmenon, hopōs chariti theou hyper pantos geusētai thanatou.
Eprepen gar autō, di' hon ta panta kai di' hou ta panta, pollous huious eis doxan agagonta ton archēgon tēs sōtērias autōn dia pathēmatōn teleiōsai.
ho te gar hagiazōn kai hoi hagiazomenoi ex henos pantes; di' hēn aitian ouk epaischynetai adelphous autous kalein,
legōn Apangelō to onoma sou tois adelphois mou, en mesō ekklēsias hymnēsō se;
Hothen, adelphoi hagioi, klēseōs epouraniou metochoi, katanoēsate ton apostolon kai archierea tēs homologias hēmōn Iēsoun,
piston onta tō poiēsanti auton hōs kai Mōusēs en holō tō oikō autou.
pleionos gar houtos doxēs para Mōusēn ēxiōtai kath' hoson pleiona timēn echei tou oikou ho kataskeuasas auton;
pas gar oikos kataskeuazetai hypo tinos, ho de panta kataskeuasas theos.
kai Mōusēs men pistos en holō tō oikō autou hōs therapōn eis martyrion tōn lalēthēsomenōn,
Christos de hōs huios epi ton oikon autou; hou oikos esmen hēmeis, ean tēn parrēsian kai to kauchēma tēs elpidos mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen.
Dio, kathōs legei to pneuma to hagion Sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte,
mē sklērynēte tas kardias hymōn hōs en tō parapikrasmō, kata tēn hēmeran tou peirasmou en tē erēmō,
phobēthōmen oun mē pote kataleipomenēs epangelias eiselthein eis tēn katapausin autou dokē tis ex hymōn hysterēkenai;
kai gar esmen euēngelismenoi kathaper kakeinoi, all' ouk ōphelēsen ho logos tēs akoēs ekeinous, mē synkekerasmenous tē pistei tois akousasin.
Eiserchometha gar eis tēn katapausin hoi pisteusantes, kathōs eirēken Hōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou Ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou, kaitoi tōn ergōn apo katabolēs kosmou genēthentōn,
eirēken gar pou peri tēs hebdomēs houtōs Kai katepausen ho theos en tē hēmera tē hebdomē apo pantōn tōn ergōn autou,
kai en toutō palin Ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou.
epei oun apoleipetai tinas eiselthein eis autēn, kai hoi proteron euangelisthentes ouk eisēlthon di' apeitheian,
palin tina horizei hēmeran, Sēmeron, en Daueid legōn meta tosouton chronon, kathōs proeirētai, Sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte, mē sklērynēte tas kardias hymōn;
ei gar autous Iēsous katepausen, ouk an peri allēs elalei meta tauta hēmeras.
Pas gar archiereus ex anthrōpōn lambanomenos hyper anthrōpōn kathistatai ta pros ton theon, hina prospherē dōra te kai thysias hyper hamartiōn,
metriopathein dynamenos tois agnoousi kai planōmenois epei kai autos perikeitai astheneian,
kai di' autēn opheilei, kathōs peri tou laou, houtōs kai peri heautou prospherein peri hamartiōn.
kai ouch heautō tis lambanei tēn timēn, alla kaloumenos hypo tou theou, kathōsper kai Aarōn.
Houtōs kai ho christos ouch heauton edoxasen genēthēnai archierea, all' ho lalēsas pros auton Huios mou ei sy, egō sēmeron gegennēka se;
kathōs kai en heterō legei Sy hiereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
hos en tais hēmerais tēs sarkos autou, deēseis te kai hiketērias pros ton dynamenon sōzein auton ek thanatou meta kraugēs ischyras kai dakryōn prosenenkas kai eisakoustheis apo tēs eulabeias,
kaiper ōn huios, emathen aph' hōn epathen tēn hypakoēn,
kai teleiōtheis egeneto pasin tois hypakouousin autō aitios sōtērias aiōniou,
prosagoreutheis hypo tou theou archiereus kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
Peri hou polys hēmin ho logos kai dysermēneutos legein, epei nōthroi gegonate tais akoais;

kai gar opheilontes einai didaskaloi dia ton chronon, palin chreian echete tou didaskein hymas tina ta stoicheia tēs archēs tōn logiōn tou theou, kai gegonate chreian echontes galaktos, ou stereas trophēs.
Dio aphentes ton tēs archēs tou christou logon epi tēn teleiotēta pherōmetha, mē palin themelion kataballomenoi metanoias apo nekrōn ergōn, kai pisteōs epi theon,
baptismōn didachēn epitheseōs te cheirōn, anastaseōs nekrōn kai krimatos aiōniou.
kai touto poiēsomen eanper epitrepē ho theos.
Adynaton gar tous hapax phōtisthentas geusamenous te tēs dōreas tēs epouraniou kai metochous genēthentas pneumatos hagiou
kai kalon geusamenous theou rhēma dynameis te mellontos aiōnos,
kai parapesontas, palin anakainizein eis metanoian, anastaurountas heautois ton huion tou theou kai paradeigmatizontas.
gē gar hē piousa ton ep' autēs erchomenon pollakis hyeton, kai tiktousa botanēn eutheton ekeinois di' hous kai geōrgeitai, metalambanei eulogias apo tou theou;
ekpherousa de akanthas kai tribolous adokimos kai kataras engys, hēs to telos eis kausin.
Pepeismetha de peri hymōn, agapētoi, ta kreissona kai echomena sōtērias, ei kai houtōs laloumen;
ou gar adikos ho theos epilathesthai tou ergou hymōn kai tēs agapēs hēs enedeixasthe eis to onoma autou, diakonēsantes tois hagiois kai diakonountes.
Houtos gar ho Melchisedek, basileus Salēm, hiereus tou theou tou hypsistou, ho synantēsas Abraam hypostrephonti apo tēs kopēs tōn basileōn kai eulogēsas auton,
hō kai dekatēn apo pantōn emerisen Abraam, prōton men hermēneuomenos Basileus Dikaiosynēs epeita de kai Basileus Salēm, ho estin basileus Eirēnēs,
apatōr, amētōr, agenealogētos, mēte archēn hēmerōn mēte zōēs telos echōn, aphōmoiōmenos de tō huiō tou theou, menei hiereus eis to diēnekes.
Theōreite de pēlikos houtos hō dekatēn Abraam edōken ek tōn akrothiniōn ho patriarchēs.
kai hoi men ek tōn huiōn Leuei tēn hieratian lambanontes entolēn echousin apodekatoin ton laon kata ton nomon, tout' estin tous adelphous autōn, kaiper exelēlythotas ek tēs osphyos Abraam;
ho de mē genealogoumenos ex autōn dedekatōken Abraam, kai ton echonta tas epangelias eulogēken.
chōris de pasēs antilogias to elatton hypo tou kreittonos eulogeitai.
kai hōde men dekatas apothnēskontes anthrōpoi lambanousin, ekei de martyroumenos hoti zē.
kai hōs epos eipein, di' Abraam kai Leueis ho dekatas lambanōn dedekatōtai,
eti gar en tē osphui tou patros ēn hote synēntēsen autō Melchisedek.

Ei men oun teleiōsis dia tēs Leueitikēs hierōsynēs ēn, ho laos gar ep' autēs nenomothetētai, tis eti chreia kata tēn taxin Melchisedek heteron anistasthai hierea kai ou kata tēn taxin Aarōn legesthai?
metatithemenēs gar tēs hierōsynēs ex anankēs kai nomou metathesis ginetai.
eph' hon gar legetai tauta phylēs heteras meteschēken, aph' hēs oudeis proseschēken tō thysiastēriō;
prodēlon gar hoti ex Iouda anatetalken ho kyrios hēmōn, eis hēn phylēn peri hiereōn ouden Mōusēs elalēsen.
Kai perissoteron eti katadēlon estin, ei kata tēn homoiotēta Melchisedek anistatai hiereus heteros,
hos ou kata nomon entolēs sarkinēs gegonen alla kata dynamin zōēs akatalytou,
martyreitai gar hoti Sy hiereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin Melchisedek.
Kephalaion de epi tois legomenois, toiouton echomen archierea, hos ekathisen en dexia tou thronou tēs megalōsynēs en tois ouranois,
tōn hagiōn leitourgos kai tēs skēnēs tēs alēthinēs, hēn epēxen ho kyrios, ouk anthrōpos.
pas gar archiereus eis to prospherein dōra te kai thysias kathistatai; hothen anankaion echein ti kai touton ho prosenenkē.
ei men oun ēn epi gēs, oud' an ēn hiereus, ontōn tōn prospherontōn kata nomon ta dōra;
hoitines hypodeigmati kai skia latreuousin tōn epouraniōn, kathōs kechrēmatistai Mōusēs mellōn epitelein tēn skēnēn, Hora gar, phēsin, poiēseis panta kata ton typon ton deichthenta soi en tō orei;
nyn de diaphorōteras tetychen leitourgias, hosō kai kreittonos estin diathēkēs mesitēs, hētis epi kreittosin epangeliais nenomothetētai.
ei gar hē prōtē ekeinē ēn amemptos, ouk an deuteras ezēteito topos;
memphomenos gar autous legei Idou hēmerai erchontai, legei Kyrios, kai syntelesō epi ton oikon Israēl kai epi ton oikon Iouda diathēkēn kainēn,

ou kata tēn diathēkēn hēn epoiēsa tois patrasin autōn en hēmera epilabomenou mou tēs cheiros autōn exagagein autous ek gēs Aigyptou, hoti autoi ouk enemeinan en tē diathēkē mou, kagō ēmelēsa autōn, legei Kyrios.
Eiche men oun kai hē prōtē dikaiōmata latreias to te hagion kosmikon.
skēnē gar kateskeuasthē hē prōtē en hē hē te lychnia kai hē trapeza kai hē prothesis tōn artōn, hētis legetai Hagia;
meta de to deuteron katapetasma skēnē hē legomenē Hagia Hagiōn,
chrysoun echousa thymiatērion kai tēn kibōton tēs diathēkēs perikekalymmenēn pantothen chrysiō, en hē stamnos chrysē echousa to manna kai hē rhabdos Aarōn hē blastēsasa kai hai plakes tēs diathēkēs,
hyperanō de autēs Cheroubein doxēs kataskiazonta to hilastērion; peri hōn ouk estin nyn legein kata meros.
Toutōn de houtōs kateskeuasmenōn, eis men tēn prōtēn skēnēn dia pantos eisiasin hoi hiereis tas latreias epitelountes,
eis de tēn deuteran hapax tou eniautou monos ho archiereus, ou chōris haimatos, ho prospherei hyper heautou kai tōn tou laou agnoēmatōn,
touto dēlountos tou pneumatos tou hagiou, mēpō pephanerōsthai tēn tōn hagiōn hodon eti tēs prōtēs skēnēs echousēs stasin,
hētis parabolē eis ton kairon ton enestēkota, kath' hēn dōra te kai thysiai prospherontai mē dynamenai kata syneidēsin teleiōsai ton latreuonta,
monon epi brōmasin kai pomasin kai diaphorois baptismois, dikaiōmata sarkos mechri kairou diorthōseōs epikeimena.
Christos de paragenomenos archiereus tōn genomenōn agathōn dia tēs meizonos kai teleioteras skēnēs ou cheiropoiētou, tout' estin ou tautēs tēs ktiseōs,
oude di' haimatos tragōn kai moschōn dia de tou idiou haimatos, eisēlthen ephapax eis ta hagia, aiōnian lytrōsin heuramenos.
ei gar to haima tragōn kai taurōn kai spodos damaleōs rhantizousa tous kekoinōmenous hagiazei pros tēn tēs sarkos katharotēta,
posō mallon to haima tou christou, hos dia pneumatos aiōniou heauton prosēnenken amōmon tō theō, kathariei tēn syneidēsin hēmōn apo nekrōn ergōn eis to latreuein theō zōnti.
Kai dia touto diathēkēs kainēs mesitēs estin, hopōs thanatou genomenou eis apolytrōsin tōn epi tē prōtē diathēkē parabaseōn tēn epangelian labōsin hoi keklēmenoi tēs aiōniou klēronomias.
hopou gar diathēkē, thanaton anankē pheresthai tou diathemenou;
diathēkē gar epi nekrois bebaia, epei mē tote ischyei hote zē ho diathemenos.
Hothen oude hē prōtē chōris haimatos enkekainistai;

lalētheisēs gar pasēs entolēs kata ton nomon hypo Mōuseōs panti tō laō, labōn to haima tōn moschōn kai tōn tragōn meta hydatos kai eriou kokkinou kai hyssōpou auto te to biblion kai panta ton laon erantisen,
legōn Touto to haima tēs diathēkēs hēs eneteilato pros hymas ho theos;

Skian gar echōn ho nomos tōn mellontōn agathōn, ouk autēn tēn eikona tōn pragmatōn, kat' eniauton tais autais thysiais has prospherousin eis to diēnekes oudepote dynantai tous proserchomenous teleiōsai;
epei ouk an epausanto prospheromenai, dia to mēdemian echein eti syneidēsin hamartiōn tous latreuontas hapax kekatharismenous?
all' en autais anamnēsis hamartiōn kat' eniauton,
adynaton gar haima taurōn kai tragōn aphairein hamartias.
Dio eiserchomenos eis ton kosmon legei Thysian kai prosphoran ouk ēthelēsas, sōma de katērtisō moi;
holokautōmata kai peri hamartias ouk eudokēsas.
tote eipon Idou hēkō, en kephalidi bibliou gegraptai peri emou, tou poiēsai, ho theos, to thelēma sou.
anōteron legōn hoti Thysias kai prosphoras kai holokautōmata kai peri hamartias ouk ēthelēsas oude eudokēsas, haitines kata nomon prospherontai,
tote eirēken Idou hēkō tou poiēsai to thelēma sou; anairei to prōton hina to deuteron stēsē.
en hō thelēmati hēgiasmenoi esmen dia tēs prosphoras tou sōmatos Iēsou Christou ephapax.
Kai pas men hiereus hestēken kath' hēmeran leitourgōn kai tas autas pollakis prospherōn thysias, haitines oudepote dynantai perielein hamartias.
houtos de mian hyper hamartiōn prosenenkas thysian eis to diēnekes ekathisen en dexia tou theou,
to loipon ekdechomenos heōs tethōsin hoi echthroi autou hypopodion tōn podōn autou,
mia gar prosphora teteleiōken eis to diēnekes tous hagiazomenous.
Martyrei de hēmin kai to pneuma to hagion, meta gar to eirēkenai
Hautē hē diathēkē hēn diathēsomai pros autous meta tas hēmeras ekeinas, legei Kyrios, didous nomous mou epi kardias autōn, kai epi tēn dianoian autōn epigrapsō autous,
Kai tōn hamartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthēsomai eti;
hopou de aphesis toutōn, ouketi prosphora peri hamartias.
Estin de pistis elpizomenōn hypostasis, pragmatōn elenchos ou blepomenōn;
en tautē gar emartyrēthēsan hoi presbyteroi.
Pistei nooumen katērtisthai tous aiōnas rhēmati theou, eis to mē ek phainomenōn to blepomenon gegonenai.
Pistei pleiona thysian Habel para Kain prosēnenken tō theō, di' hēs emartyrēthē einai dikaios, martyrountos epi tois dōrois autou tou theou, kai di' autēs apothanōn eti lalei.
Pistei Henōch metetethē tou mē idein thanaton, kai ouch hēurisketo dioti metethēken auton ho theos; pro gar tēs metatheseōs memartyrētai euarestēkenai tō theō,
chōris de pisteōs adynaton euarestēsai, pisteusai gar dei ton proserchomenon tō theō hoti estin kai tois ekzētousin auton misthapodotēs ginetai.
Pistei chrēmatistheis Nōe peri tōn mēdepō blepomenōn eulabētheis kateskeuasen kibōton eis sōtērian tou oikou autou, di' hēs katekrinen ton kosmon, kai tēs kata pistin dikaiosynēs egeneto klēronomos.
Toigaroun kai hēmeis, tosouton echontes perikeimenon hēmin nephos martyrōn, onkon apothemenoi panta kai tēn euperistaton hamartian, di' hypomonēs trechōmen ton prokeimenon hēmin agōna,
aphorōntes eis ton tēs pisteōs archēgon kai teleiōtēn Iēsoun, hos anti tēs prokeimenēs autō charas hypemeinen stauron aischynēs kataphronēsas, en dexia te tou thronou tou theou kekathiken.
analogisasthe gar ton toiautēn hypomemenēkota hypo tōn hamartōlōn eis heautous antilogian, hina mē kamēte tais psychais hymōn eklyomenoi.
Oupō mechris haimatos antikatestēte pros tēn hamartian antagōnizomenoi,
kai eklelēsthe tēs paraklēseōs, hētis hymin hōs huiois dialegetai, Huie mou, mē oligōrei paideias Kyriou, mēde eklyou hyp' autou elenchomenos;
hon gar agapa Kyrios paideuei, mastigoi de panta huion hon paradechetai.
eis paideian hypomenete; hōs huiois hymin prospheretai ho theos; tis gar huios hon ou paideuei patēr?
ei de chōris este paideias hēs metochoi gegonasi pantes, ara nothoi kai ouch huioi este.
tēs philoxenias mē epilanthanesthe, dia tautēs gar elathon tines xenisantes angelous.
mimnēskesthe tōn desmiōn hōs syndedemenoi, tōn kakouchoumenōn hōs kai autoi ontes en sōmati.
Timios ho gamos en pasin kai hē koitē amiantos, pornous gar kai moichous krinei ho theos.
Aphilargyros ho tropos; arkoumenoi tois parousin; autos gar eirēken Ou mē se anō oud' ou mē se enkatalipō;
hōste tharrountas hēmas legein Kyrios emoi boēthos, ou phobēthēsomai; ti poiēsei moi anthrōpos?

name: James
chapters: IAKŌBOS theou kai kyriou Iēsou Christou doulos tais dōdeka phylais tais en tē diaspora chairein.
Pasan charan hēgēsasthe, adelphoi mou, hotan peirasmois peripesēte poikilois,
ginōskontes hoti to dokimion hymōn tēs pisteōs katergazetai hypomonēn;
hē de hypomonē ergon teleion echetō, hina ēte teleioi kai holoklēroi, en mēdeni leipomenoi.
Ei de tis hymōn leipetai sophias, aiteitō para tou didontos theou pasin haplōs kai mē oneidizontos, kai dothēsetai autō;
aiteitō de en pistei, mēden diakrinomenos, ho gar diakrinomenos eoiken klydōni thalassēs anemizomenō kai rhipizomenō;
mē gar oiesthō ho anthrōpos ekeinos hoti lēmpsetai ti para tou kyriou
anēr dipsychos, akatastatos en pasais tais hodois autou.
Kauchasthō de ho adelphos ho tapeinos en tō hypsei autou,
ho de plousios en tē tapeinōsei autou, hoti hōs anthos chortou pareleusetai.
aneteilen gar ho hēlios syn tō kausōni kai exēranen ton chorton, kai to anthos autou exepesen kai hē euprepeia tou prosōpou autou apōleto; houtōs kai ho plousios en tais poreiais autou maranthēsetai.
Makarios anēr hos hypomenei peirasmon, hoti dokimos genomenos lēmpsetai ton stephanon tēs zōēs, hon epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton.
mēdeis peirazomenos legetō hoti Apo theou peirazomai; ho gar theos apeirastos estin kakōn, peirazei de autos oudena.
hekastos de peirazetai hypo tēs idias epithymias exelkomenos kai deleazomenos;
eita hē epithymia syllabousa tiktei hamartian, hē de hamartia apotelestheisa apokyei thanaton.
pasa dosis agathē kai pan dōrēma teleion anōthen estin, katabainon apo tou patros tōn phōtōn, par' hō ouk eni parallagē ē tropēs aposkiasma.
boulētheis apekyēsen hēmas logō alētheias, eis to einai hēmas aparchēn tina tōn autou ktismatōn.
Iste, adelphoi mou agapētoi. estō de pas anthrōpos tachys eis to akousai, bradys eis to lalēsai, bradys eis orgēn,
orgē gar andros dikaiosynēn theou ouk ergazetai.
dio apothemenoi pasan rhyparian kai perisseian kakias en prautēti dexasthe ton emphyton logon ton dynamenon sōsai tas psychas hymōn.
Ginesthe de poiētai logou kai mē akroatai monon paralogizomenoi heautous.
hoti ei tis akroatēs logou estin kai ou poiētēs, houtos eoiken andri katanoounti to prosōpon tēs geneseōs autou en esoptrō,
katenoēsen gar heauton kai apelēlythen kai eutheōs epelatheto hopoios ēn.
ho de parakypsas eis nomon teleion ton tēs eleutherias kai parameinas, ouk akroatēs epilēsmonēs genomenos alla poiētēs ergou, houtos makarios en tē poiēsei autou estai.
Ei tis dokei thrēskos einai mē chalinagōgōn glōssan heautou alla apatōn kardian heautou, toutou mataios hē thrēskeia.
thrēskeia kathara kai amiantos para tō theō kai patri hautē estin, episkeptesthai orphanous kai chēras en tē thlipsei autōn, aspilon heauton tērein apo tou kosmou.
Adelphoi mou, mē en prosōpolēmpsiais echete tēn pistin tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou tēs doxēs?
ean gar eiselthē eis synagōgēn hymōn anēr chrysodaktylios en esthēti lampra, eiselthē de kai ptōchos en rhypara esthēti,
epiblepsēte de epi ton phorounta tēn esthēta tēn lampran kai eipēte Sy kathou hōde kalōs, kai tō ptōchō eipēte Sy stēthi ē kathou ekei hypo to hypopodion mou,
ou diekrithēte en heautois kai egenesthe kritai dialogismōn ponērōn?
Akousate, adelphoi mou agapētoi. ouch ho theos exelexato tous ptōchous tō kosmō plousious en pistei kai klēronomous tēs basileias hēs epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton?
hymeis de ētimasate ton ptōchon. ouch hoi plousioi katadynasteuousin hymōn, kai autoi helkousin hymas eis kritēria?
ouk autoi blasphēmousin to kalon onoma to epiklēthen eph' hymas?
ei mentoi nomon teleite basilikon kata tēn graphēn Agapēseis ton plēsion sou hōs seauton, kalōs poieite;
ei de prosōpolēmpteite, hamartian ergazesthe, elenchomenoi hypo tou nomou hōs parabatai.
Hostis gar holon ton nomon tērēsē, ptaisē de en heni, gegonen pantōn enochos.
ho gar eipōn Mē moicheusēs eipen kai Mē phoneusēs; ei de ou moicheueis phoneueis de, gegonas parabatēs nomou.
houtōs laleite kai houtōs poieite hōs dia nomou eleutherias mellontes krinesthai.
hē gar krisis aneleos tō mē poiēsanti eleos; katakauchatai eleos kriseōs.
Ti ophelos, adelphoi mou, ean pistin legē tis echein erga de mē echē? mē dynatai hē pistis sōsai auton?
ean adelphos ē adelphē gymnoi hyparchōsin kai leipomenoi tēs ephēmerou trophēs,
eipē de tis autois ex hymōn Hypagete en eirēnē, thermainesthe kai chortazesthe, mē dōte de autois ta epitēdeia tou sōmatos, ti ophelos?
houtōs kai hē pistis, ean mē echē erga, nekra estin kath' heautēn.
all' erei tis Sy pistin echeis kagō erga echō. deixon moi tēn pistin sou chōris tōn ergōn, kagō soi deixō ek tōn ergōn mou tēn pistin.
sy pisteueis hoti heis theos estin? kalōs poieis; kai ta daimonia pisteuousin kai phrissousin.
theleis de gnōnai, ō anthrōpe kene, hoti hē pistis chōris tōn ergōn argē estin?
Abraam ho patēr hēmōn ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē, anenenkas Isaak ton huion autou epi to thysiastērion?
blepeis hoti hē pistis synērgei tois ergois autou kai ek tōn ergōn hē pistis eteleiōthē,
Mē polloi didaskaloi ginesthe, adelphoi mou, eidotes hoti meizon krima lēmpsometha;
polla gar ptaiomen hapantes. ei tis en logō ou ptaiei, houtos teleios anēr, dynatos chalinagōgēsai kai holon to sōma.
ei de tōn hippōn tous chalinous eis ta stomata ballomen eis to peithesthai autous hēmin, kai holon to sōma autōn metagomen.
idou kai ta ploia, tēlikauta onta kai hypo anemōn sklērōn elaunomena, metagetai hypo elachistou pēdaliou hopou hē hormē tou euthynontos bouletai;
houtōs kai hē glōssa mikron melos estin kai megala auchei. idou hēlikon pyr hēlikēn hylēn anaptei;
kai hē glōssa pyr, ho kosmos tēs adikias hē glōssa kathistatai en tois melesin hēmōn, hē spilousa holon to sōma kai phlogizousa ton trochon tēs geneseōs kai phlogizomenē hypo tēs geennēs.
pasa gar physis thēriōn te kai peteinōn herpetōn te kai enaliōn damazetai kai dedamastai tē physei tē anthrōpinē;
tēn de glōssan oudeis damasai dynatai anthrōpōn; akatastaton kakon, mestē iou thanatēphorou.
en autē eulogoumen ton kyrion kai patera, kai en autē katarōmetha tous anthrōpous tous kath' homoiōsin theou gegonotas;
ek tou autou stomatos exerchetai eulogia kai katara. ou chrē, adelphoi mou, tauta houtōs ginesthai.
mēti hē pēgē ek tēs autēs opēs bryei to glyky kai to pikron?
mē dynatai, adelphoi mou, sykē elaias poiēsai ē ampelos syka? oute halykon glyky poiēsai hydōr.
Tis sophos kai epistēmōn en hymin? deixatō ek tēs kalēs anastrophēs ta erga autou en prautēti sophias.
ei de zēlon pikron echete kai erithian en tē kardia hymōn, mē katakauchasthe kai pseudesthe kata tēs alētheias.
ouk estin hautē hē sophia anōthen katerchomenē, alla epigeios, psychikē, daimoniōdēs;
hopou gar zēlos kai erithia, ekei akatastasia kai pan phaulon pragma.
hē de anōthen sophia prōton men hagnē estin, epeita eirēnikē, epieikēs, eupeithēs, mestē eleous kai karpōn agathōn, adiakritos, anypokritos;
karpos de dikaiosynēs en eirēnē speiretai tois poiousin eirēnēn.
Pothen polemoi kai pothen machai en hymin? ouk enteuthen, ek tōn hēdonōn hymōn tōn strateuomenōn en tois melesin hymōn?
epithymeite, kai ouk echete; phoneuete kai zēloute, kai ou dynasthe epitychein; machesthe kai polemeite. ouk echete dia to mē aiteisthai hymas;
aiteite kai ou lambanete, dioti kakōs aiteisthe, hina en tais hēdonais hymōn dapanēsēte.
moichalides, ouk oidate hoti hē philia tou kosmou echthra tou theou estin? hos ean oun boulēthē philos einai tou kosmou, echthros tou theou kathistatai.
ē dokeite hoti kenōs hē graphē legei Pros phthonon epipothei to pneuma ho katōkisen en hēmin?
meizona de didōsin charin; dio legei HO theos hyperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin.
Hypotagēte oun tō theō; antistēte de tō diabolō, kai pheuxetai aph' hymōn;
engisate tō theō, kai engisei hymin. katharisate cheiras, hamartōloi, kai hagnisate kardias, dipsychoi.
talaipōrēsate kai penthēsate kai klausate; ho gelōs hymōn eis penthos metatrapētō kai hē chara eis katēpheian;
tapeinōthēte enōpion Kyriou, kai hypsōsei hymas.
Mē katalaleite allēlōn, adelphoi; ho katalalōn adelphou ē krinōn ton adelphon autou katalalei nomou kai krinei nomon; ei de nomon krineis, ouk ei poiētēs nomou alla kritēs.
heis estin nomothetēs kai kritēs, ho dynamenos sōsai kai apolesai; sy de tis ei, ho krinōn ton plēsion?
Age nyn hoi legontes Sēmeron ē aurion poreusometha eis tēnde tēn polin kai poiēsomen ekei eniauton kai emporeusometha kai kerdēsomen;
hoitines ouk epistasthe tēs aurion poia hē zōē hymōn; atmis gar este pros oligon phainomenē, epeita kai aphanizomenē;
anti tou legein hymas Ean ho kyrios thelē, kai zēsomen kai poiēsomen touto ē ekeino.
nyn de kauchasthe en tais alazoniais hymōn; pasa kauchēsis toiautē ponēra estin.
eidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti, hamartia autō estin.
Age nyn hoi plousioi, klausate ololyzontes epi tais talaipōriais hymōn tais eperchomenais.
ho ploutos hymōn sesēpen, kai ta himatia hymōn sētobrōta gegonen,
ho chrysos hymōn kai ho argyros katiōtai, kai ho ios autōn eis martyrion hymin estai kai phagetai tas sarkas hymōn; hōs pyr ethēsaurisate en eschatais hēmerais.
idou ho misthos tōn ergatōn tōn amēsantōn tas chōras hymōn ho aphysterēmenos aph' hymōn krazei, kai hai boai tōn therisantōn eis ta ōta Kyriou Sabaōth eiselēlythan;
etryphēsate epi tēs gēs kai espatalēsate, ethrepsate tas kardias hymōn en hēmera sphagēs.
katedikasate, ephoneusate ton dikaion. ouk antitassetai hymin?
Makrothymēsate oun, adelphoi, heōs tēs parousias tou kyriou. idou ho geōrgos ekdechetai ton timion karpon tēs gēs, makrothymōn ep' autō heōs labē proimon kai opsimon.
makrothymēsate kai hymeis, stērixate tas kardias hymōn, hoti hē parousia tou kyriou ēngiken.
mē stenazete, adelphoi, kat' allēlōn, hina mē krithēte; idou ho kritēs pro tōn thyrōn hestēken.
hypodeigma labete, adelphoi, tēs kakopathias kai tēs makrothymias tous prophētas, hoi elalēsan en tō onomati Kyriou.
idou makarizomen tous hypomeinantas; tēn hypomonēn Iōb ēkousate, kai to telos Kyriou eidete, hoti polysplanchnos estin ho kyrios kai oiktirmōn.
Pro pantōn de, adelphoi mou, mē omnyete, mēte ton ouranon mēte tēn gēn mēte allon tina horkon; ētō de hymōn to Nai nai kai to Ou ou, hina mē hypo krisin pesēte.
Kakopathei tis en hymin? proseuchesthō; euthymei tis? psalletō.
asthenei tis en hymin? proskalesasthō tous presbyterous tēs ekklēsias, kai proseuxasthōsan ep' auton aleipsantes elaiō en tō onomati tou kyriou;
kai hē euchē tēs pisteōs sōsei ton kamnonta, kai egerei auton ho kyrios; kan hamartias ē pepoiēkōs, aphethēsetai autō.
exomologeisthe oun allēlois tas hamartias kai proseuchesthe hyper allēlōn, hopōs iathēte. poly ischyei deēsis dikaiou energoumenē.
Ēleias anthrōpos ēn homoiopathēs hēmin, kai proseuchē prosēuxato tou mē brexai, kai ouk ebrexen epi tēs gēs eniautous treis kai mēnas hex;
kai palin prosēuxato, kai ho ouranos hyeton edōken kai hē gē eblastēsen ton karpon autēs.
Adelphoi mou, ean tis en hymin planēthē apo tēs alētheias kai epistrepsē tis auton,
ginōskete hoti ho epistrepsas hamartōlon ek planēs hodou autou sōsei psychēn autou ek thanatou kai kalypsei plēthos hamartiōn.

name: 1 Peter
chapters: PETROS apostolos Iēsou Christou eklektois parepidēmois diasporas Pontou, Galatias, Kappadokias, Asias, kai Bithynias,
kata prognōsin theou patros, en hagiasmō pneumatos, eis hypakoēn kai rhantismon haimatos Iēsou Christou; charis hymin kai eirēnē plēthyntheiē.
Eulogētos ho theos kai patēr tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou, ho kata to poly autou eleos anagennēsas hēmas eis elpida zōsan di' anastaseōs Iēsou Christou ek nekrōn,
eis klēronomian aphtharton kai amianton kai amaranton, tetērēmenēn en ouranois eis hymas
tous en dynamei theou phrouroumenous dia pisteōs eis sōtērian hetoimēn apokalyphthēnai en kairō eschatō.
en hō agalliasthe, oligon arti ei deon lypēthentes en poikilois peirasmois,
hina to dokimion hymōn tēs pisteōs polytimoteron chrysiou tou apollymenou dia pyros de dokimazomenou heurethē eis epainon kai doxan kai timēn en apokalypsei Iēsou Christou.
hon ouk idontes agapate, eis hon arti mē horōntes pisteuontes de agalliate chara aneklalētō kai dedoxasmenē,
komizomenoi to telos tēs pisteōs sōtērian psychōn.
Peri hēs sōtērias exezētēsan kai exēraunēsan prophētai hoi peri tēs eis hymas charitos prophēteusantes,
eraunōntes eis tina ē poion kairon edēlou to en autois pneuma Christou promartyromenon ta eis Christon pathēmata kai tas meta tauta doxas;
hois apekalyphthē hoti ouch heautois hymin de diēkonoun auta, ha nyn anēngelē hymin dia tōn euangelisamenōn hymas pneumati hagiō apostalenti ap' ouranou, eis ha epithymousin angeloi parakypsai.
Dio anazōsamenoi tas osphyas tēs dianoias hymōn, nēphontes teleiōs, elpisate epi tēn pheromenēn hymin charin en apokalypsei Iēsou Christou.
hōs tekna hypakoēs, mē synschēmatizomenoi tais proteron en tē agnoia hymōn epithymiais,
alla kata ton kalesanta hymas hagion kai autoi hagioi en pasē anastrophē genēthēte,
dioti gegraptai hoti Hagioi esesthe, hoti egō hagios.
kai ei patera epikaleisthe ton aprosōpolēmptōs krinonta kata to hekastou ergon, en phobō ton tēs paroikias hymōn chronon anastraphēte;
eidotes hoti ou phthartois, argyriō ē chrysiō, elytrōthēte ek tēs mataias hymōn anastrophēs patroparadotou,
Apothemenoi oun pasan kakian kai panta dolon kai hypokrisin kai phthonous kai pasas katalalias,
hōs artigennēta brephē to logikon adolon gala epipothēsate, hina en autō auxēthēte eis sōtērian,
ei egeusasthe hoti chrēstos ho kyrios.
pros hon proserchomenoi, lithon zōnta, hypo anthrōpōn men apodedokimasmenon para de theō eklekton entimon
kai autoi hōs lithoi zōntes oikodomeisthe oikos pneumatikos eis hierateuma hagion, anenenkai pneumatikas thysias euprosdektous theō dia Iēsou Christou;
dioti periechei en graphē Idou tithēmi en Siōn lithon eklekton akrogōniaion entimon, kai ho pisteuōn ep' autō ou mē kataischynthē.
hymin oun hē timē tois pisteuousin; apistousin de lithos hon apedokimasan hoi oikodomountes houtos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
kai lithos proskommatos kai petra skandalou; hoi proskoptousin tō logō apeithountes; eis ho kai etethēsan.
hymeis de genos eklekton, basileion hierateuma, ethnos hagion, laos eis peripoiēsin, hopōs tas aretas exangeilēte tou ek skotous hymas kalesantos eis to thaumaston autou phōs;
hoi pote ou laos nyn de laos theou, hoi ouk ēleēmenoi nyn de eleēthentes.
Agapētoi, parakalō hōs paroikous kai parepidēmous apechesthai tōn sarkikōn epithymiōn, haitines strateuontai kata tēs psychēs;
tēn anastrophēn hymōn en tois ethnesin echontes kalēn, hina, en hō katalalousin hymōn hōs kakopoiōn, ek tōn kalōn ergōn epopteuontes doxasōsi ton theon en hēmera episkopēs.
Hypotagēte pasē anthrōpinē ktisei dia ton kyrion; eite basilei hōs hyperechonti,
eite hēgemosin hōs di' autou pempomenois eis ekdikēsin kakopoiōn epainon de agathopoiōn;
hoti houtōs estin to thelēma tou theou, agathopoiountas phimoin tēn tōn aphronōn anthrōpōn agnōsian;
hōs eleutheroi, kai mē hōs epikalymma echontes tēs kakias tēn eleutherian, all' hōs theou douloi.
pantas timēsate, tēn adelphotēta agapate, ton theon phobeisthe, ton basilea timate.
Hoi oiketai hypotassomenoi en panti phobō tois despotais, ou monon tois agathois kai epieikesin alla kai tois skoliois.
touto gar charis ei dia syneidēsin theou hypopherei tis lypas paschōn adikōs;
poion gar kleos ei hamartanontes kai kolaphizomenoi hypomeneite? all' ei agathopoiountes kai paschontes hypomeneite, touto charis para theō.
eis touto gar eklēthēte, hoti kai Christos epathen hyper hymōn, hymin hypolimpanōn hypogrammon hina epakolouthēsēte tois ichnesin autou;
hos hamartian ouk epoiēsen oude heurethē dolos en tō stomati autou;
hos loidoroumenos ouk anteloidorei, paschōn ouk ēpeilei, paredidou de tō krinonti dikaiōs;
hos tas hamartias hēmōn autos anēnenken en tō sōmati autou epi to xylon, hina tais hamartiais apogenomenoi tē dikaiosynē zēsōmen; hou tō mōlōpi iathēte.
ēte gar hōs probata planōmenoi, alla epestraphēte nyn epi ton poimena kai episkopon tōn psychōn hymōn.
Homoiōs gynaikes hypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin, hina ei tines apeithousin tō logō dia tēs tōn gynaikōn anastrophēs aneu logou kerdēthēsontai
epopteusantes tēn en phobō hagnēn anastrophēn hymōn.
hōn estō ouch ho exōthen emplokēs trichōn kai peritheseōs chrysiōn ē endyseōs himatiōn kosmos,
all' ho kryptos tēs kardias anthrōpos en tō aphthartō tou hēsychiou kai praeōs pneumatos, ho estin enōpion tou theou polyteles.
houtōs gar pote kai hai hagiai gynaikes hai elpizousai eis theon ekosmoun heautas, hypotassomenai tois idiois andrasin,
hōs Sarra hypēkouen tō Abraam, kyrion auton kalousa; hēs egenēthēte tekna agathopoiousai kai mē phoboumenai mēdemian ptoēsin.
Hoi andres homoiōs synoikountes kata gnōsin, hōs asthenesterō skeuei tō gynaikeiō aponemontes timēn, hōs kai synklēronomoi charitos zōēs, eis to mē enkoptesthai tas proseuchas hymōn.
To de telos pantes homophrones, sympatheis, philadelphoi, eusplanchnoi, tapeinophrones,
mē apodidontes kakon anti kakou ē loidorian anti loidorias tounantion de eulogountes, hoti eis touto eklēthēte hina eulogian klēronomēsēte.
ho gar thelōn zōēn agapan kai idein hēmeras agathas pausatō tēn glōssan apo kakou kai cheilē tou mē lalēsai dolon,
ekklinatō de apo kakou kai poiēsatō agathon, zētēsatō eirēnēn kai diōxatō autēn.
hoti ophthalmoi Kyriou epi dikaious kai ōta autou eis deēsin autōn, prosōpon de Kyriou epi poiountas kaka.
Kai tis ho kakōsōn hymas ean tou agathou zēlōtai genēsthe?
all' ei kai paschoite dia dikaiosynēn, makarioi. ton de phobon autōn mē phobēthēte mēde tarachthēte,
kyrion de ton Christon hagiasate en tais kardiais hymōn, hetoimoi aei pros apologian panti tō aitounti hymas logon peri tēs en hymin elpidos, alla meta prautētos kai phobou,
syneidēsin echontes agathēn, hina en hō katalaleisthe kataischynthōsin hoi epēreazontes hymōn tēn agathēn en Christō anastrophēn.
kreitton gar agathopoiountas, ei theloi to thelēma tou theou, paschein ē kakopoiountas.
hoti kai Christos hapax peri hamartiōn apethanen, dikaios hyper adikōn, hina hymas prosagagē tō theō, thanatōtheis men sarki zōopoiētheis de pneumati;
en hō kai tois en phylakē pneumasin poreutheis ekēryxen,
apeithēsasin pote hote apexedecheto hē tou theou makrothymia en hēmerais Nōe kataskeuazomenēs kibōtou eis hēn oligoi, tout' estin oktō psychai, diesōthēsan di' hydatos.
ho kai hymas antitypon nyn sōzei baptisma, ou sarkos apothesis rhypou alla syneidēseōs agathēs eperōtēma eis theon, di' anastaseōs Iēsou Christou,
hos estin en dexia theou poreutheis eis ouranon hypotagentōn autō angelōn kai exousiōn kai dynameōn.
Christou oun pathontos sarki kai hymeis tēn autēn ennoian hoplisasthe, hoti ho pathōn sarki pepautai hamartiais,
eis to mēketi anthrōpōn epithymiais alla thelēmati theou ton epiloipon en sarki biōsai chronon.
arketos gar ho parelēlythōs chronos to boulēma tōn ethnōn kateirgasthai, peporeumenous en aselgeiais, epithymiais, oinophlygiais, kōmois, potois, kai athemitois eidōlolatriais.
en hō xenizontai mē syntrechontōn hymōn eis tēn autēn tēs asōtias anachysin, blasphēmountes;
hoi apodōsousin logon tō hetoimōs krinonti zōntas kai nekrous;
eis touto gar kai nekrois euēngelisthē hina krithōsi men kata anthrōpous sarki zōsi de kata theon pneumati.
Pantōn de to telos ēngiken. sōphronēsate oun kai nēpsate eis proseuchas;
pro pantōn tēn eis heautous agapēn ektenē echontes, hoti agapē kalyptei plēthos hamartiōn;
hekastos kathōs elaben charisma, eis heautous auto diakonountes hōs kaloi oikonomoi poikilēs charitos theou;

ei tis lalei, hōs logia theou; ei tis diakonei, hōs ex ischyos hēs chorēgei ho theos; hina en pasin doxazētai ho theos dia Iēsou Christou, hō estin hē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn; amēn.
Agapētoi, mē xenizesthe tē en hymin pyrōsei pros peirasmon hymin ginomenē hōs xenou hymin symbainontos,
alla katho koinōneite tois tou Christou pathēmasin chairete, hina kai en tē apokalypsei tēs doxēs autou charēte agalliōmenoi.
ei oneidizesthe en onomati Christou, makarioi, hoti to tēs doxēs kai to tou theou pneuma eph' hymas anapauetai.
mē gar tis hymōn paschetō hōs phoneus ē kleptēs ē kakopoios ē hōs allotriepiskopos;
ei de hōs Christianos, mē aischynesthō, doxazetō de ton theon en tō onomati toutō.
Presbyterous oun en hymin parakalō ho synpresbyteros kai martys tōn tou Christou pathēmatōn, ho kai tēs mellousēs apokalyptesthai doxēs koinōnos,
poimanate to en hymin poimnion tou theou, mē anankastōs alla hekousiōs, mēde aischrokerdōs alla prothymōs,
mēd' hōs katakyrieuontes tōn klērōn alla typoi ginomenoi tou poimniou;
kai phanerōthentos tou archipoimenos komieisthe ton amarantinon tēs doxēs stephanon.
Homoiōs, neōteroi, hypotagēte presbyterois. Pantes de allēlois tēn tapeinophrosynēn enkombōsasthe, hoti ho theos hyperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin.
Tapeinōthēte oun hypo tēn krataian cheira tou theou, hina hymas hypsōsē en kairō,
pasan tēn merimnan hymōn epiripsantes ep' auton, hoti autō melei peri hymōn.
Nēpsate, grēgorēsate. ho antidikos hymōn diabolos hōs leōn ōryomenos peripatei zētōn katapiein;
hō antistēte stereoi tē pistei, eidotes ta auta tōn pathēmatōn tē en tō kosmō hymōn adelphotēti epiteleisthai.
HO de theos pasēs charitos, ho kalesas hymas eis tēn aiōnion autou doxan en Christō, oligon pathontas autos katartisei, stērixei, sthenōsei.
autō to kratos eis tous aiōnas; amēn.
Dia Silouanou hymin tou pistou adelphou, hōs logizomai, di' oligōn egrapsa, parakalōn kai epimartyrōn tautēn einai alēthē charin tou theou; eis hēn stēte.
Aspazetai hymas hē en Babylōni syneklektē kai Markos ho huios mou.
Aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agapēs. Eirēnē hymin pasin tois en Christō.

name: 2 Peter
chapters: SIMŌN PETROS doulos kai apostolos Iēsou Christou tois isotimon hēmin lachousin pistin en dikaiosynē tou theou hēmōn kai sōtēros Iēsou Christou;
charis hymin kai eirēnē plēthyntheiē en epignōsei tou theou kai Iēsou tou kyriou hēmōn,
hōs panta hēmin tēs theias dynameōs autou ta pros zōēn kai eusebeian dedōrēmenēs dia tēs epignōseōs tou kalesantos hēmas dia doxēs kai aretēs,
di' hōn ta timia kai megista hēmin epangelmata dedōrētai, hina dia toutōn genēsthe theias koinōnoi physeōs, apophygontes tēs en tō kosmō en epithymia phthoras.
kai auto touto de spoudēn pasan pareisenenkantes epichorēgēsate en tē pistei hymōn tēn aretēn, en de tē aretē tēn gnōsin,
en de tē gnōsei tēn enkrateian, en de tē enkrateia tēn hypomonēn, en de tē hypomonē tēn eusebeian,
en de tē eusebeia tēn philadelphian, en de tē philadelphia tēn agapēn;
tauta gar hymin hyparchonta kai pleonazonta ouk argous oude akarpous kathistēsin eis tēn tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou epignōsin;
hō gar mē parestin tauta, typhlos estin myōpazōn, lēthēn labōn tou katharismou tōn palai autou hamartiōn.
dio mallon, adelphoi, spoudasate bebaian hymōn tēn klēsin kai eklogēn poieisthai; tauta gar poiountes ou mē ptaisēte pote;
houtōs gar plousiōs epichorēgēthēsetai hymin hē eisodos eis tēn aiōnion basileian tou kyriou hēmōn kai sōtēros Iēsou Christou.
Dio mellēsō aei hymas hypomimnēskein peri toutōn, kaiper eidotas kai estērigmenous en tē parousē alētheia.
dikaion de hēgoumai, eph' hoson eimi en toutō tō skēnōmati, diegeirein hymas en hypomnēsei,
eidōs hoti tachinē estin hē apothesis tou skēnōmatos mou, kathōs kai ho kyrios hēmōn Iēsous Christos edēlōsen moi;
spoudasō de kai hekastote echein hymas meta tēn emēn exodon tēn toutōn mnēmēn poieisthai.
ou gar sesophismenois mythois exakolouthēsantes egnōrisamen hymin tēn tou kyriou hēmōn Iēsou Christou dynamin kai parousian, all' epoptai genēthentes tēs ekeinou megaleiotētos.
labōn gar para theou patros timēn kai doxan phōnēs enechtheisēs autō toiasde hypo tēs megaloprepous doxēs HO huios mou ho agapētos mou houtos estin, eis hon egō eudokēsa,

Egenonto de kai pseudoprophētai en tō laō, hōs kai en hymin esontai pseudodidaskaloi, hoitines pareisaxousin haireseis apōleias, kai ton agorasanta autous despotēn arnoumenoi, epagontes heautois tachinēn apōleian;
kai polloi exakolouthēsousin autōn tais aselgeiais, di' hous hē hodos tēs alētheias blasphēmēthēsetai;
kai en pleonexia plastois logois hymas emporeusontai; hois to krima ekpalai ouk argei, kai hē apōleia autōn ou nystazei.
ei gar ho theos angelōn hamartēsantōn ouk epheisato, alla seirois zophou tartarōsas paredōken eis krisin tēroumenous,
kai archaiou kosmou ouk epheisato, alla ogdoon Nōe dikaiosynēs kēryka ephylaxen, kataklysmon kosmō asebōn epaxas,
kai poleis Sodomōn kai Gomorras tephrōsas katekrinen, hypodeigma mellontōn asebesin tetheikōs,
kai dikaion Lōt kataponoumenon hypo tēs tōn athesmōn en aselgeia anastrophēs erysato,
blemmati gar kai akoē dikaios enkatoikōn en autois hēmeran ex hēmeras psychēn dikaian anomois ergois ebasanizen,
oiden Kyrios eusebeis ek peirasmou rhyesthai, adikous de eis hēmeran kriseōs kolazomenous tērein,
malista de tous opisō sarkos en epithymia miasmou poreuomenous kai kyriotētos kataphronountas. tolmētai, authadeis, doxas ou tremousin, blasphēmountes,
hopou angeloi ischui kai dynamei meizones ontes ou pherousin kat' autōn para Kyriō blasphēmon krisin.
houtoi de, hōs aloga zōa gegennēmena physika eis halōsin kai phthoran, en hois agnoousin blasphēmountes, en tē phthora autōn kai phtharēsontai,
adikoumenoi misthon adikias; hēdonēn hēgoumenoi tēn en hēmera tryphēn, spiloi kai mōmoi entryphōntes en tais apatais autōn syneuōchoumenoi hymin,
ophthalmous echontes mestous moichalidos kai akatapastous hamartias, deleazontes psychas astēriktous, kardian gegymnasmenēn pleonexias echontes, kataras tekna,
kataleipontes eutheian hodon eplanēthēsan, exakolouthēsantes tē hodō tou Balaam tou Beōr hos misthon adikias ēgapēsen
elenxin de eschen idias paranomias; hypozygion aphōnon en anthrōpou phōnē phthenxamenon ekōlysen tēn tou prophētou paraphronian.
houtoi eisin pēgai anydroi kai homichlai hypo lailapos elaunomenai, hois ho zophos tou skotous tetērētai.
Tautēn ēdē, agapētoi, deuteran hymin graphō epistolēn, en hais diegeirō hymōn en hypomnēsei tēn eilikrinē dianoian,
mnēsthēnai tōn proeirēmenōn rhēmatōn hypo tōn hagiōn prophētōn kai tēs tōn apostolōn hymōn entolēs tou kyriou kai sōtēros,
touto prōton ginōskontes hoti eleusontai ep' eschatōn tōn hēmerōn en empaigmonē empaiktai kata tas idias epithymias autōn poreuomenoi
kai legontes Pou estin hē epangelia tēs parousias autou? aph' hēs gar hoi pateres ekoimēthēsan, panta houtōs diamenei ap' archēs ktiseōs.
lanthanei gar autous touto thelontas hoti ouranoi ēsan ekpalai kai gē ex hydatos kai di' hydatos synestōsa tō tou theou logō,
di' hōn ho tote kosmos hydati kataklystheis apōleto;
hoi de nyn ouranoi kai hē gē tō autō logō tethēsaurismenoi eisin pyri tēroumenoi eis hēmeran kriseōs kai apōleias tōn asebōn anthrōpōn.
Hen de touto mē lanthanetō hymas, agapētoi, hoti mia hēmera para Kyriō hōs chilia etē kai chilia etē hōs hēmera mia.
ou bradynei Kyrios tēs epangelias, hōs tines bradytēta hēgountai, alla makrothymei eis hymas, mē boulomenos tinas apolesthai alla pantas eis metanoian chōrēsai.
Hēxei de hēmera Kyriou hōs kleptēs, en hē hoi ouranoi rhoizēdon pareleusontai, stoicheia de kausoumena lythēsetai, kai gē kai ta en autē erga heurethēsetai.
Toutōn houtōs pantōn lyomenōn potapous dei hyparchein hymas en hagiais anastrophais kai eusebeiais,

name: 1 John
chapters: O ĒN AP' ARCHĒS, ho akēkoamen, ho heōrakamen tois ophthalmois hēmōn, ho etheasametha kai hai cheires hēmōn epsēlaphēsan, peri tou logou tēs zōēs,
kai hē zōē ephanerōthē, kai heōrakamen kai martyroumen kai apangellomen hymin tēn zōēn tēn aiōnion hētis ēn pros ton patera kai ephanerōthē hēmin,
ho heōrakamen kai akēkoamen apangellomen kai hymin, hina kai hymeis koinōnian echēte meth' hēmōn; kai hē koinōnia de hē hēmetera meta tou patros kai meta tou huiou autou Iēsou Christou;
kai tauta graphomen hēmeis hina hē chara hēmōn ē peplērōmenē.
Kai estin hautē hē angelia hēn akēkoamen ap' autou kai anangellomen hymin, hoti ho theos phōs estin kai skotia ouk estin en autō oudemia.
Ean eipōmen hoti koinōnian echomen met' autou kai en tō skotei peripatōmen, pseudometha kai ou poioumen tēn alētheian;
ean de en tō phōti peripatōmen hōs autos estin en tō phōti, koinōnian echomen met' allēlōn kai to haima Iēsou tou huiou autou katharizei hēmas apo pasēs hamartias.
Ean eipōmen hoti hamartian ouk echomen, heautous planōmen kai hē alētheia ouk estin en hēmin.
ean homologōmen tas hamartias hēmōn, pistos estin kai dikaios hina aphē hēmin tas hamartias kai katharisē hēmas apo pasēs adikias.
Ean eipōmen hoti ouch hēmartēkamen, pseustēn poioumen auton kai ho logos autou ouk estin en hēmin.
Teknia mou, tauta graphō hymin hina mē hamartēte. kai ean tis hamartē, paraklēton echomen pros ton patera Iēsoun Christon dikaion,
kai autos hilasmos estin peri tōn hamartiōn hēmōn, ou peri tōn hēmeterōn de monon alla kai peri holou tou kosmou.
Kai en toutō ginōskomen hoti egnōkamen auton, ean tas entolas autou tērōmen.
ho legōn hoti Egnōka auton kai tas entolas autou mē tērōn pseustēs estin, kai en toutō hē alētheia ouk estin;
hos d' an tērē autou ton logon, alēthōs en toutō hē agapē tou theou teteleiōtai. En toutō ginōskomen hoti en autō esmen;
ho legōn en autō menein opheilei kathōs ekeinos periepatēsen kai autos peripatein.
Agapētoi, ouk entolēn kainēn graphō hymin, all' entolēn palaian hēn eichete ap' archēs; hē entolē hē palaia estin ho logos hon ēkousate.
palin entolēn kainēn graphō hymin, ho estin alēthes en autō kai en hymin, hoti hē skotia paragetai kai to phōs to alēthinon ēdē phainei.
HO legōn en tō phōti einai kai ton adelphon autou misōn en tē skotia estin heōs arti.
ho agapōn ton adelphon autou en tō phōti menei, kai skandalon en autō ouk estin;
ho de misōn ton adelphon autou en tē skotia estin kai en tē skotia peripatei, kai ouk oiden pou hypagei, hoti hē skotia etyphlōsen tous ophthalmous autou.
Graphō hymin, teknia, hoti apheōntai hymin hai hamartiai dia to onoma autou;
graphō hymin, pateres, hoti egnōkate ton ap' archēs; graphō hymin, neaniskoi, hoti nenikēkate ton ponēron.

egrapsa hymin, paidia, hoti egnōkate ton patera; egrapsa hymin, pateres, hoti egnōkate ton ap' archēs; egrapsa hymin, neaniskoi, hoti ischyroi este kai ho logos tou theou en hymin menei kai nenikēkate ton ponēron.
Mē agapate ton kosmon mēde ta en tō kosmō. ean tis agapa ton kosmon, ouk estin hē agapē tou patros en autō;
hoti pan to en tō kosmō, hē epithymia tēs sarkos kai hē epithymia tōn ophthalmōn kai hē alazonia tou biou, ouk estin ek tou patros, alla ek tou kosmou estin;
kai ho kosmos paragetai kai hē epithymia autou, ho de poiōn to thelēma tou theou menei eis ton aiōna.
Paidia, eschatē hōra estin, kai kathōs ēkousate hoti antichristos erchetai, kai nyn antichristoi polloi gegonasin; hothen ginōskomen hoti eschatē hōra estin.
ex hēmōn exēlthan, all' ouk ēsan ex hēmōn; ei gar ex hēmōn ēsan, memenēkeisan an meth' hēmōn; all' hina phanerōthōsin hoti ouk eisin pantes ex hēmōn.
kai hymeis chrisma echete apo tou hagiou; oidate pantes
ouk egrapsa hymin hoti ouk oidate tēn alētheian, all' hoti oidate autēn, kai hoti pan pseudos ek tēs alētheias ouk estin.
Tis estin ho pseustēs ei mē ho arnoumenos hoti Iēsous ouk estin ho christos? houtos estin ho antichristos, ho arnoumenos ton patera kai ton huion.
Idete potapēn agapēn dedōken hēmin ho patēr hina tekna theou klēthōmen, kai esmen. dia touto ho kosmos ou ginōskei hēmas hoti ouk egnō auton.
Agapētoi, nyn tekna theou esmen, kai oupō ephanerōthē ti esometha. oidamen hoti ean phanerōthē homoioi autō esometha, hoti opsometha auton kathōs estin.
kai pas ho echōn tēn elpida tautēn ep' autō hagnizei heauton kathōs ekeinos hagnos estin.
Pas ho poiōn tēn hamartian kai tēn anomian poiei, kai hē hamartia estin hē anomia.
kai oidate hoti ekeinos ephanerōthē hina tas hamartias arē, kai hamartia en autō ouk estin.
pas ho en autō menōn ouch hamartanei; pas ho hamartanōn ouch heōraken auton oude egnōken auton.
Teknia, mēdeis planatō hymas; ho poiōn tēn dikaiosynēn dikaios estin, kathōs ekeinos dikaios estin;
ho poiōn tēn hamartian ek tou diabolou estin, hoti ap' archēs ho diabolos hamartanei. eis touto ephanerōthē ho huios tou theou hina lysē ta erga tou diabolou.
Pas ho gegennēmenos ek tou theou hamartian ou poiei, hoti sperma autou en autō menei, kai ou dynatai hamartanein, hoti ek tou theou gegennētai.
en toutō phanera estin ta tekna tou theou kai ta tekna tou diabolou; pas ho mē poiōn dikaiosynēn ouk estin ek tou theou, kai ho mē agapōn ton adelphon autou.
hoti hautē estin hē angelia hēn ēkousate ap' archēs, hina agapōmen allēlous;
ou kathōs Kain ek tou ponērou ēn kai esphaxen ton adelphon autou; kai charin tinos esphaxen auton? hoti ta erga autou ponēra ēn, ta de tou adelphou autou dikaia.
Mē thaumazete, adelphoi, ei misei hymas ho kosmos.
hēmeis oidamen hoti metabebēkamen ek tou thanatou eis tēn zōēn, hoti agapōmen tous adelphous; ho mē agapōn menei en tō thanatō.
pas ho misōn ton adelphon autou anthrōpoktonos estin, kai oidate hoti pas anthrōpoktonos ouk echei zōēn aiōnion en autō menousan.
En toutō egnōkamen tēn agapēn, hoti ekeinos hyper hēmōn tēn psychēn autou ethēken; kai hēmeis opheilomen hyper tōn adelphōn tas psychas theinai.
hos d' an echē ton bion tou kosmou kai theōrē ton adelphon autou chreian echonta kai kleisē ta splanchna autou ap' autou, pōs hē agapē tou theou menei en autō?
Teknia, mē agapōmen logō mēde tē glōssē alla en ergō kai alētheia.
En toutō gnōsometha hoti ek tēs alētheias esmen, kai emprosthen autou peisomen tēn kardian hēmōn
hoti ean kataginōskē hēmōn hē kardia, hoti meizōn estin ho theos tēs kardias hēmōn kai ginōskei panta.
Agapētoi, ean hē kardia mē kataginōskē, parrēsian echomen pros ton theon,
kai ho an aitōmen lambanomen ap' autou, hoti tas entolas autou tēroumen kai ta aresta enōpion autou poioumen.
